zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerhard V. von Jülich於大約1252年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次爾利時，他的父親Wilhelm IV. von Jülich38歲，母親Ricarda von Geldern32歲。他於1299年12月13日之前與Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1328年7月29日享年77歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫迪倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerhard V. von Jülich于大约1252年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次爾利时，他的父亲Wilhelm IV. von Jülich38岁，母亲Ricarda von Geldern32岁。他于1299年12月13日之前与Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1328年7月29日享年77岁，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫迪倫。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Jülich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto.

variants.name: Juhl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Arno, Erwin, Heinz, Kurt.

Danish and Norwegian: nickname for someone who was born on Christmas Day or had some other connection with this time of year, from Old Norse jól. This was originally the name of a pagan midwinter festival, which was later appropriated by the Christian Church for celebration of the birth of Christ.
German (of Slavic origin): nickname or topographic name from a Germanized Slavic stem gol ‘naked, barren’.

nameMeanings.name: Gerhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerhard V. von Jülich was born about 1252, in Jülich, Rhineland, Prussia, his father, Wilhelm IV. von Jülich, was 38 and his mother, Ricarda von Geldern, was 32. He married Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot before 13 December 1299. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 29 July 1328, at the age of 77, and was buried in Düren, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerhard V. von Jülich est né environ 1252, à Jülich, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Wilhelm IV. von Jülich, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Ricarda von Geldern, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot avant 13 décembre 1299. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 juillet 1328, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.Aachen, Aachener Reich, Holy Roman Empir: Aachen, Aachener Reich, Heiliges Römisches Reich
de.lifeSummary: Als Gerhard V. von Jülich um 1252 in Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wilhelm IV. von Jülich 38 und seine Mutter Ricarda von Geldern 32. Er hat vor 13. Dezember 1299 Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Juli 1328 im Alter von 77 Jahren und wurde in Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerhard V. von Jülich è nato il circa 1252 nel Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, il suo padre, Wilhelm IV. von Jülich, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Ricarda von Geldern, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot prima del 13 dicembre 1299. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 luglio 1328, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Gerhard V. von Jülich(이)가 대략 1252년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 ju리치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wilhelm IV. von Jülich(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Ricarda von Geldern(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1299년 12월 13일 이전 Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1328년 7월 29일 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 드u런에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerhard V. von Jülich nasceu aproximadamente 1252, em Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, seu pai, Wilhelm IV. von Jülich, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Ricarda von Geldern, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot antes 13 de dezembro de 1299. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de julho de 1328, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.Aachen, Aachener Reich, Holy Roman Empir: аачэн, аачэнир раич, хилигесь рoмищесь раич
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerhard V. von Jülich родился около 1252 г. в местности джuлич, раинпровинз, Пруссия, его отцу по имени Wilhelm IV. von Jülich было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Ricarda von Geldern, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot перед 13 декабрь 1299 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 июля 1328 г. в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности дuрен, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerhard V. von Jülich nació aproximadamente 1252, en Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, su papá, Wilhelm IV. von Jülich, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Ricarda von Geldern, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot antes de 13 de diciembre de 1299. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de julio de 1328, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
